assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 45-49 match the original exactly: Bug issue type ID: 10001, Bug template: docs/bug-template.md, Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks. discovery-log.md lines 89-95 state 'Bug Configuration is up to date' and 'Skipped -- no changes needed.'
